Tech.title: Intuit to lay off over 3,000 employees to refocus on AI
Tech.summary: Enterprise software giant Intuit is letting 17% of its staff go, or about 3,000 people, as it seeks to divert resources toward baking AI into its products, Reutersreported, citing an internal memo sent to employees.

Tech.title: Kash Patel’s clothing brand website shut down after reports it was hacked
Tech.summary: The merchandise website of FBI director Kash Patel was taken offline on Friday after reports that it had been hijacked by hackers trying to infect visitors with malware,as first reported by Straight Arrow News.
